steps.title: Send AitM Phishing Email
steps.text: Attacker sends phishing email with link to AitM reverse proxy mimicking Okta login.

steps.title: Intercept Credentials via AitM Proxy
steps.text: Reverse proxy captures victim credentials and MFA token in real-time, transparent to user.

steps.title: Steal Session Token
steps.text: AitM proxy captures the authenticated session cookie after MFA completion.

steps.title: Replay Session from Attacker Infrastructure
steps.text: Attacker replays stolen session cookie from different IP to access victim's cloud services.

steps.title: Pivot to Cloud Applications
steps.text: Using hijacked identity, attacker accesses SharePoint, Exchange, Teams, and OneDrive.

steps.title: Multi-IP Session Alert Fires
steps.text: Sentinel detects the same user authenticating from 3+ IPs within 15 minutes — Critical alert.

steps.title: CLAW: Revoke Sessions & Contain
steps.text: Automated playbook revokes all Okta + Azure AD sessions, resets MFA, blocks attacker IPs.

steps.title: Authentication Timeline Analysis
steps.text: SOC builds complete auth timeline: which apps accessed, what data touched, what the blast radius is.

steps.title: Phishing-Resistant MFA Mandate
steps.text: CISO decides to mandate FIDO2/WebAuthn org-wide to eliminate AitM attack surface.

steps.title: Deploy Identity Protection Controls
steps.text: Apply conditional access policy, enable CAE, deploy governance controls for identity security.
